title: 来襲！　スペース野球ゾンビ

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Urk. I was supposed to be training today, but I
couldn't resist the urge to come here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: But that trailer for the highly anticipated Attack of the Spaceball Zombies is not fair!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
How can there be zombies in space?! And why are
they playing baseball on a spaceship?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There is no way I can focus on training with all of
these questions in my head!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! One student ticket, please!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what an astounding story... It truly delivered
on the grand spectacle they advertised.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To think that without that last home run, Earth
would have fallen into the hands of the spaceball
zombies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
From now on, every time I look at the sky, I will
think of that ball disappearing into Mars.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Coming out on a weekday, the movie theater was
nice and quiet. I could make a habit of this.
